title: Operator verify docs and Windows local verify reliability
problem: ticket-051 implemented research verify, but AGENTS.md and README.md still list only decomposed pytest/safety commands. Windows audits repeatedly hit PATH confusion when research is not on PATH. Local Windows verification also failed: nested pytest subprocess capture in test_ci_golden_gate raised WinError 6, and verify appeared to hang with no progress output.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md default verification leads with python -m rge.cli verify and documents --skip-site.
README operator quickstart and verification table document verify and Windows module-form fallback.
Docs do not claim bare research verify works when Scripts dir is off PATH.
python -m pytest -q passes on Windows without WinError 6 in test_default_pytest_deselects_live_smoke.
python -m rge.cli verify --skip-site emits stderr progress while subprocess checks run.
non_goals: Do not change CI workflow definitions.
Do not update unrelated README status counts.
rollback_plan: Revert AGENTS.md and README.md doc edits.
